purpose: Full RAG held-out fixture for non-Airbyte IT runbook command extraction and internal issue wording.

sections.title: Proxy restart after failover
sections.text: After promoting the standby database, restart the Postgres proxy so application sessions reconnect to the new primary. Run: kubectl -n data-platform rollout restart statefulset/postgres-proxy. Confirm that the health check reports the new primary endpoint before reopening writes.

sections.title: Redis warmup
sections.text: Warm Redis keys after a planned deploy by running docker compose run cache-warmer --scope billing. This runbook is unrelated to Postgres failover.

source_docs.title: Postgres proxy pool exhausted after failover

sections.title: Summary
sections.text: The internal issue reports that Postgres proxy connections timed out after failover because the proxy pool kept sessions pinned to the old primary. Operators resolved it by restarting the postgres-proxy statefulset and confirming new sessions used the promoted database.

queries.name: fullrag_it_postgres_proxy_restart_command
queries.query: Which command restarts the Postgres proxy after failover?

queries.name: fullrag_it_internal_issue_not_github
queries.query: Postgres proxy timeout issue. What does this mean?
expected_answer_contains: Postgres proxy pool exhausted after failover

purpose: Full RAG held-out fixture for CJK workflow retrieval, direct uploaded-style evidence, and unsupported next-step abstain.

sections.title: 入职权限审批
sections.text: 入职权限审批流程：候选人签署 offer 后，HR 在 HR Portal > Onboarding 创建入职记录。直属 manager 审批岗位、成本中心和系统权限范围。审批完成后，IT 权限工单会自动创建，IT service desk 在员工入职日前一天完成账号和设备准备。

sections.title: 清理备注
sections.text: 清理备注：不要对用户改动运行 git reset。本地调试时忽略 .env、.venv、node_modules、__pycache__ 和 .next 输出目录。本节不是 roadmap，也不是下一阶段实施计划。

queries.name: fullrag_hr_onboarding_cjk_workflow
queries.query: 入职权限审批流程是怎样的？

queries.name: fullrag_hr_cleanup_next_step_abstain
queries.query: 这个项目下一步应该怎么改？

purpose: Full RAG held-out fixture for non-Airbyte release lookup, release explanation, and internal issue explanation.

sections.title: Offline invoice bundles
sections.text: Offline invoice bundles let finance teams prepare quarterly invoice archives without waiting for live export jobs. Billing admins open Reports > Offline Bundles, choose a fiscal quarter, and download CSV summaries plus a signed PDF audit sheet.

source_docs.title: Offline bundle export fails without invoice_export permission

sections.title: Summary
sections.text: The internal issue reports that billing admins could open Reports > Offline Bundles but could not download the bundle unless their role included the invoice_export permission. The workaround is to add invoice_export to the billing-admin role before retrying the export.
